# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor /run/postgresql /var/run/redis

RUN pip3 install flask gunicorn

RUN bash -lc "mkdir -p /app/api && cat > /app/api/app.py <<'EOF'\nfrom flask import Flask\napp = Flask(__name__)\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef index():\n    return {'status': 'ok', 'service': 'api'}\nEOF"

RUN bash -lc "cat > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'\nserver {\n    listen 80 default_server;\n    listen [::]:80 default_server;\n    server_name _;\n\n    location / {\n        return 200 'web server running';\n        add_header Content-Type text/plain;\n    }\n\n    location /api/ {\n        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8080/;\n        proxy_set_header Host \$host;\n        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP \$remote_addr;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For \$proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto \$scheme;\n    }\n}\nEOF"

RUN bash -lc "cat > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf <<'EOF'\n[supervisord]\nnodaemon=true\n\n[program:postgresql]\ncommand=/usr/bin/bash -lc \"mkdir -p /var/run/postgresql && chown -R postgres:postgres /var/run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql && [ -d /var/lib/postgresql/14/main ] || su - postgres -c '/usr/lib/postgresql/14/bin/initdb -D /var/lib/postgresql/14/main'; exec su - postgres -c '/usr/lib/postgresql/14/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/14/main -k /var/run/postgresql'\"\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\npriority=10\nstdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:redis]\ncommand=/usr/bin/redis-server --bind 0.0.0.0 --protected-mode no\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\npriority=20\nstdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:api]\ndirectory=/app/api\ncommand=/usr/local/bin/gunicorn --bind 0.0.0.0:8080 app:app\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\npriority=30\nstdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:nginx]\ncommand=/usr/sbin/nginx -g 'daemon off;'\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\npriority=40\nstdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\nEOF"

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
